rationale: This is a Thief Puzzle / "pull-the-pin" style fail-bait archetype with stick-figure 2D animation, bright yellow/green palette, and a narrative-driven character gag — none of which align with Bounce Blast 3D's character-free, calm/satisfying 3D abstract physics-puzzle DNA (dark purple/orange palette, block placement + chain reactions). Mechanic match is near zero: there's no thief/draw-puzzle hook to graft onto tap-to-place block clearing without misrepresenting the product, which risks installs but terrible D1/D7 retention. Audience skews younger and meme-driven vs. the 25-55 relaxed casual target — do not greenlight; if testing fail-emotion creatives, build a native version using a "wrong block placement → physics fail → satisfying retry" beat instead.
